name: playscope-team
description: PlayScope influencer, store, localization, and social content analysis prototype

optionalEnv.OPENAI_API_KEY: Enables AI reports and vision analysis.
optionalEnv.APIFY_TOKEN: Enables Instagram post collection through Apify.
optionalEnv.APIFY_ACTOR_ID: Optional Apify actor override. Defaults to apify/instagram-profile-scraper.
optionalEnv.SERPAPI_KEY: Enables Google Play web search fallback.
